---
name: Mod Request
about: Suggest a new mod for BadPCMC
title: "[Mod Request] <Mod Name>"
labels: ["enhancement", "mod request"]
assignees: ""
---

**Mod Name**
<!-- Exact name of the mod -->

**Modrinth Link**
<!-- e.g., https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium -->
<!-- ⚠️ Only Modrinth links are accepted – the pack is Modrinth-only. -->

**Mod Category**
<!-- Performance / Bug Fix / Quality of Life / Library / Other -->

**Mod Loader**
<!-- Fabric / Forge / NeoForge / Quilt (must match the pack’s loader) -->

**Supported Minecraft Version(s)**
<!-- e.g., 1.20.1, 1.21 -->

**Why should this be added?**
<!-- How does it improve performance or fix issues? Does it fill a gap? -->

**Compatibility**
- Have you tested this mod with the current BadPCMC modpack? (Yes / No / Not yet)
- Are there any known conflicts with existing mods?
- Does it require additional libraries or dependencies?

**Additional Context**
<!-- Benchmarks, comparisons, issue references, etc. -->

---

### 📋 Before submitting
- [ ] I have checked that this mod is **not already included** in BadPCMC.
- [ ] The mod is **actively maintained** and compatible with the pack’s Minecraft version.
- [ ] I understand that only **Modrinth** sources will be considered.
